data.title: Fast-growing educational tech leader chooses authID for biometric security in online services at correctional facilities.
data.description: An educational technology company experiencing rapid growth has decided to replace its current in-house authentication system with authID. This change aims to enhance security measures, safeguard privacy, and mitigate fraudulent activities in the setting of distance learning. The decision reflects the need to adapt to the demands of a complex and fast-evolving educational environment.

South Korea October current account balance at provisional plus 6.81 billion versus plus 13.47 billion in September central bank

data.title: Fuel retailers urge Trump to support year-round E15; NATSO, SIGMA, and NACS issue joint industry letter.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia, on December 4, 2025, NATSO, a group for travel plazas and truck stops, along with SIGMA, America's top fuel marketers, and the National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS) released a statement. This joint industry letter was addressed to President Trump, urging action on a particular issue.
JAPAN DEFENSE CHIEF KOIZUMI SET TO VISIT US IN EARLY JANUARY – ASAHI

data.title: ARC wins US Army's xTech Counterstrike competition in "passive sensing" category. Enables soldiers to counter UAS without added cognitive burden.
data.description: Armaments Research Company (ARC), a prominent player in AI-powered weapon-mounted sensing technology, has recently emerged victorious in the U.S. Army’s xTech Counterstrike competition. This competition, which aims to drive innovation in counter-unmanned aircraft system (C-UAS) technologies on a global scale, selected ARC as one of the four winners. ARC secured the top spot in the "passive sensing" category. This achievement will allow soldiers to effectively prompt UAS defeat capabilities at the tactical level, all while minimizing any extra mental strain on the soldiers.

data.title: IMF warns that stablecoin use could limit central bank control, despite increasing access to financial services.
data.description: According to the International Monetary Fund (IMF), stablecoins have the capacity to enhance people's reach to financial services, but this advancement could potentially lead to challenges for central banks. The IMF highlights that the increasing popularity of stablecoins could impact the role of central banks in overseeing financial stability and monetary policy. This shift in the financial landscape may have significant repercussions, as stablecoins present the possibility of reaching a wider audience and facilitating financial inclusion on a broader scale. As stablecoins gain momentum in the market, central banks may need to adapt to new challenges and consider regulatory frameworks to ensure financial stability and safeguard against risks that could emerge from the growth of stablecoins.

data.title: Catalight Chief Clinical Officer Dr. Doreen Samelson wins Gold at 2025 Merit Awards for Healthcare, pioneering national shift in autism care. Wellbeing is new standard of success.
data.description: Catalight, based in Walnut Creek, California, revealed on December 4, 2025, that their Chief Clinical Officer, Dr. Doreen Samelson, Ed.D., MSCP, was honored as a Gold Winner for leading a national change in autism care. This shift prioritizes wellbeing as the primary indicator of success. This recognition underscores Catalight's commitment to transforming the approach to autism treatment.
SUPREME COURT LETS TEXAS USE GOP-DRAWN VOTING MAP IN 2026

data.title: Fortis Inc. declares Q1 dividends for 2026 - part of designated news release for prospectus supplement of Dec. 9, 2024.
data.description: This news release is considered a designated news release referenced in the prospectus supplement dated December 9, 2024, concerning Fortis' short form base shelf prospectus from the same date.

data.title: Education Cannot Wait initiative by World Vision supports displaced children in Ethiopia, providing hope, nutrition, and learning opportunities.
data.description: World Vision and its partners are implementing a comprehensive education program funded by Education Cannot Wait for displaced children in Ethiopia. The initiative aims to provide hope, nutrition, and educational opportunities to the affected youth. Aschila, a young girl who is 11 years old, experienced the devastating effects of conflict in her life. This program in Ethiopia has been active since December 4, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Diversified Fall Protection launches new Safety Configurator - an online tool to configure and buy guardrail systems in minutes.
data.description: A cutting-edge online tool has been launched by Diversified Fall Protection, a top player in engineered fall protection, enabling users to design and buy guardrail systems swiftly. This innovative tool provides real-time pricing and seamless e-commerce integration. Rolled out on Dec. 4, 2025, from WESTLAKE, Ohio, this platform allows users to configure and purchase guardrail systems in just minutes. This development revolutionizes the buying process, offering convenience and efficiency to customers.

data.title: Atlanta-based private equity firm Eagle Merchant Partners has invested in Atlantic Pipe Services to aid its growth in water infrastructure, including inspection, cleaning, and rehabilitation services.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Eagle Merchant Partners, a private equity firm headquartered in Atlanta, finalized a strategic investment in Atlantic Pipe Services (APS). APS, a prominent company in the industry, specializes in offering inspection, cleaning, and rehabilitation services for stormwater and wastewater systems. This investment is significant for both companies' growth and development in the sector.

data.title: MDA Space to offer C$250 million senior unsecured notes due 2030 in private placement, underwriting agreement in place.
data.description: In Brampton, Ontario on December 4, 2025, MDA Space Ltd. disclosed plans to engage in a private placement offering. The Company, listed as MDA on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX:MDA), finalized the pricing of the Offering and has secured an underwriting agreement. As part of this agreement, MDA Space will be selling C$250 million in aggregate value.
FEDERAL GRAND JURY IN VIRGINIA REFUSED TO INDICT NEW YORK ATTORNEY GENERAL LETITIA JAMES FOR ALLEGED MORTGAGE FRAUD ON THURSDAY -MEDIA REPORTS

data.title: Mercado Libre issues $750M of 2033 senior unsecured notes, oversubscribed 3.6x by 150+ investors post attaining Investment Grade status.
data.description: In Uruguay, Mercado Libre has reported the issuance of its 2033 senior unsecured notes amounting to a total of USD 750 million. This marks the company's first transaction post achieving Investment Grade status and received significant interest from over 150 institutional investors, resulting in a 3.6x oversubscription. The strong demand signifies ongoing trust in Mercado Libre's operational plan, performance, and ability to generate cash. The raised funds, intended for general corporate purposes, highlight the confidence of investors in the company's future prospects.

data.title: Samsara beats Q3 earnings, stock dips as revenue outlook falls slightly short of expectations.
data.description: Samsara's stock experienced a decrease following the release of their third-quarter earnings, which exceeded expectations. However, their revenue guidance for the future was only slightly higher than anticipated. The company's positive earnings news was overshadowed by the less impressive revenue outlook.

data.title: Rubrik stock surged after beating Q3 earnings, following September plunge, despite low guidance.
data.description: Rubrik's stock experienced a significant increase following the release of its fiscal Q3 financial results, which surpassed expectations. This positive development came after the company's shares experienced a sharp decline in September due to disappointing guidance. The upbeat news of Rubrik's Q3 earnings beat amidst previously low expectations was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: FGIC gets approval from NYSDFS for CPP upward adjustment from 64.50% to 66.00% for permitted policy claims.
data.description: New York-based Financial Guaranty Insurance Company (FGIC) revealed today that the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYSDFS) has given the green light for an increase in the cash payment percentage of permitted policy claims required to be paid under the First Amended Plan of Rehabilitation for FGIC. The CPP has been upped from 64.50% to 66.00%, as per the terms set on June 4, 2013. This change will come into effect on December __, marking a positive development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Chinese bank tokenizes $600M in yuan bonds, sold to digital yuan holders. Bond backed by CBDC developed by China.
data.description: A bond was sold to holders of the digital yuan, a form of central bank digital currency (CBDC) created by the Chinese government.
